description_long: This rifle features a classic submachine gun silhouette with a metallic receiver and barrel assembly, complemented by a robust black synthetic stock and foregrip. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, reflective metallic tone, while the stock and foregrip are matte black, likely made from polymer or composite material. The rifle has a straight magazine well beneath the receiver, a prominent trigger guard, and a vertical pistol grip. The barrel is relatively short and capped with a simple muzzle, and the foregrip is cylindrical, providing a secure hold. Iron sights are mounted on the top of the receiver and barrel, with no visible optics or advanced sighting systems. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, rugged firearm suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, metallic submachine gun-style rifle with a black synthetic stock and foregrip, featuring iron sights and a straight magazine well. The finish is a mix of glossy metal and matte black polymer.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the black synthetic stock, metallic receiver, barrel, and foregrip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, iron front sight, and cylindrical foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the stock, receiver, and foregrip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the stock and the top of the receiver, with the iron rear sight visible.
